introSection: Nuclear Rush is a steel spinning indoor kiddie roller coaster located at Scene75 at The Mall at Tuttle Crossing in Dublin, Ohio, USA. It opened with the entertainment center on October 11, 2019.
fullText:
Nuclear Rush is a steel spinning indoor kiddie roller coaster located at Scene75 at The Mall at Tuttle Crossing in Dublin, Ohio, USA. It opened with the entertainment center on October 11, 2019.



Each row sits back-to-back.
